source: Combined from 4 source files. external: selfaware, glm-distractor; authored: socratic-clarify, cynefin-classify
leakage:
SelfAware dataset (OkayestProgrammer/selfAware) contains general-knowledge questions with answerability labels. Questions are trivia-style and may appear in model training data. Leakage risk is moderate for common trivia facts, low for obscure ones. Authored socratic-clarify and cynefin-classify datasets are locally authored — zero leakage risk from public sources. GLM distractor items may have training data overlap.

Source breakdown: 1 external dataset(s) with potential training-data leakage; 2 authored dataset(s) with zero external leakage;

label.definition: Abstention/answerability: whether the model correctly determines if a question is answerable with verifiable information, or correctly decides whether to ask a clarifying question.

calibration.exemption: claude-sonnet-4-6 achieves 88% baseline accuracy on placebo/baseline condition (22 ceiling, 3 floor over 25 items at K_TRIALS=5). The selfaware answerability items are too easy for this solver. Previous K_TRIALS=3 measurement (41.2% on 30 items) was less reliable; the K_TRIALS=5 measurement shows clear ceiling.
calibration.sample_note: Replaced by calib-m3 measured sample (n=25, K_TRIALS=5, solver=claude-sonnet-4-6).

item_class_definitions.target: Items that directly measure the family value surface — in-domain, skill-relevant items where the skill is expected to help.
item_class_definitions.near_miss: Items that are similar to the family domain but not an exact match. Useful for calibration but may not benefit from the skill.
item_class_definitions.distractor: Items that are clearly off-target (target=false). Used to measure false-positive rate and specificity.
item_class_definitions.ambiguous: Items whose relevance to the family is unclear. Excluded from decisive splits.

pool_limitations.near_miss_zero: This family intentionally has 0 near-miss items. The decisive split rule requires >=1 target + >=1 distractor, which is satisfied (110 targets, 37 distractors). This is a known pool limitation from m3-candidate-pools — proceed without near-miss items.
